---
title: "Research Summary"
subtitle: "PSS Forum"
author: "Martin Corley"
institute: "University of Edinburgh"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css:
      - default
      - "my_lib/hygge-edi.css"
      - "my_lib/edi-colours.css"
      - "my_lib/edi-fonts.css"
      - "my_lib/animate.css"
    lib_dir: libs
    nature:
      beforeInit: "my_lib/macros.js"
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: "16:9"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
class: edi-softblue

# Research Interests
<br/>
## focus on how humans communicate
--
<br/>

## 1. how is human speech understood? .right[.small[e.g., articulation studies]]
## 2. understanding "beyond words" .right[.small[e.g., _um_ and _uh_]]
---
class: animated, bounceInRight
# Articulation Studies
.pull-left[.center[
![:scale 70%](img/mc_u.png)
]]
.pull-right[
- imaging of tongue surface
<br/>

- typical research question:
<br/>
> does predicting what you'll hear involve the language production system?
.right[.small[(e.g., Drake & Corley, 2015)]]
]
---
# Articulation Studies
.center[
<video width= "90%" controls>
  <source src="img/prediction.mp4" type="video/mp4">
  video not supported by this browser
</video>
]
???
maybe a slide to set the research question?
---
# Articulation Studies
.center[
<video width= "70%" controls>
  <source src="img/pred2.mp4" type="video/mp4">
  video not supported by this browser
</video>
]
---
class: center, middle
![](img/miracle.png)
---
# Articulation Studies
.center[
![:scale 90%](img/ultra.png)
]
<!-- .right[.small[(Drake & Corley, 2015)]] -->
---
class: animated, bounceInRight
# Disfluency Studies
.pull-left[
- eyetracking
<br/>

- typical research question:
<br/>
> how, and how quickly, does disfluency affect the way we understand what is being said?
.right[.small[(e.g., Loy, Rohde, & Corley, 2017)]]

]
.pull-right[
.center[
![:scale 70%](img/eyet.jpg)
]]
---
# Disfluency Studies
<br/>

.center[
![:scale 80%](img/donald.png)
]
---
# Disfluency Studies
.center[
![:scale 55%](img/treasure.png)
]
.right[
<audio src="img/treasure.mp3" controls></audio>
]
---
# 
# Disfluency Studies
.center[
![:scale 60%](img/image1.png)
]
---
count: false
# Disfluency Studies
.center[
![:scale 60%](img/image2.png)
]
